fallbacks.thesis: {title} should be read through the trade-offs that separate neighboring design choices, not as a flat list of methods.
fallbacks.tension_statement: reported gains are often inseparable from the evaluation conditions, embodiment assumptions, and interface choices under which they are measured
fallbacks.rq: which design choices create the most consequential trade-offs under comparable protocols
fallbacks.anchor_text: the subsection depends on concrete evidence rather than loose description
fallbacks.evaluation_bullet: reported settings change how the comparison should be interpreted
fallbacks.limitation_text: key protocol details are reported unevenly
fallbacks.lens: task scope, interface assumptions, and evaluation constraints
